headlines.description: — Coby White made six of Charlotte’s franchise-tying 26 3-pointers and finished with 27 points as the Hornets routed the Sacramento Kings 134-90 on Tuesday night for their fourth straight win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hornets tie franchise record with 26 3s, rout Kings 134-90

events.name: New Orleans Pelicans at New York Knicks

headlines.description: — Jalen Brunson scored 32 points, including 15 in the fourth quarter, and the New York Knicks beat the New Orleans Pelicans 121-116 on Tuesday night for their seventh straight victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brunson scores 32 points as the Knicks beat the Pelicans for their seventh straight victory

headlines.description: — Donovan Mitchell scored 42 points, James Harden added 26 and the Cleveland Cavaliers beat the Orlando Magic 136-131 Tuesday night to extend their winning streak to four games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mitchell scores 42 as Cavaliers defeat Magic 136-131 to extend winning streak to 4 games

headlines.description: — Nikola Jokic had 23 points, 17 rebounds and tied a season high with 17 assists to lead the Denver Nuggets over the Phoenix Suns 125-123 on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Nikola Jokic has 23 points, knocks down late bucket to send Nuggets over Suns 125-123
